Description: Furious Chain — a rapid sequence of blows that overwhelms enemy defenses.
DescriptionEn: Furious Chain — a rapid sequence of blows that overwhelms enemy defenses.
DescriptionFr: Enchaînement Furieux — une rapide série de coups qui submerge les défenses ennemies.
DescriptionEffects: Repeats as many times as possible.
DescriptionEffectsEn: Repeats as many times as possible.
DescriptionEffectsFr: Se répète autant de fois que possible.
